title: Add shared empty state component and wiring
completion_summary: Added a shared EmptyState component and wired it into workspace navigation and core pages so missing vault data produces guided fallback UI instead of raw unavailable text.
acceptance_criteria: A reusable EmptyState component exists with title, description, and optional action
Workspace, board, and task surfaces use the shared empty state instead of raw unavailable strings
Empty states explain what to do next
